resources.string: Where cutting-edge technology meets seamless delivery for your ultimate convenience.
Send or receive parcels securely, nationwide with our fast delivery service.
Your parcels are handled with care and delivered securely to their destination.
Send or receive parcels securely, nationwide with our fast delivery service.
Track your parcels in real-time and know exactly when they will arrive.
We are here to help you 24/7 with any questions or concerns you may have.
Collect a package waiting for you
Enter your mobile number and we\'ll send you instructions to reset your PIN
We\'ve sent a verification code to your mobile number
Create a secure PIN for your account
We need to verify your identity to complete registration
Send packages nationwide with secure delivery
Collect packages waiting for you at this location
Manage your profile and delivery history
Collect packages from this kiosk location
Drop off packages at this kiosk location
See your assigned delivery route and schedule
Update delivery status and add notes
Manage your courier profile and performance
All dimensions should be in millimeters (mm)

Your package has been successfully processed.

Please:
1. Take your receipt and barcode label
2. Place your package in Locker %d
3. Stick the barcode label on your package
4. Close the locker door

The recipient will be notified.
Are you sure you want to cancel? All entered data will be lost.
Location permission denied. Cannot get sender location.
Using default location. GPS signal not available.
Please place your package in Locker %d and close the door.
Are you sure you want to logout?
Network error. Please check your connection.
Please enter a valid phone number
Login failed. Please check your credentials.
OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
Your session has expired. Please login again.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Enter technician credentials to access diagnostic tools
Please enter a valid email address (e.g., user@example.com)
Please enter a valid phone number (+2637XXXXXXXX)
Please enter a valid National ID (Format: XX-XXXXXXX-X-XX)
No suburbs available for selected city
Cities are still loading. Please wait…
Unable to connect after multiple attempts. Please try again later.
Account created successfully! Please sign in.
Scan a parcel barcode to begin drop-off
Collect packages from this kiosk location
Drop off packages at this kiosk location
See your assigned delivery route and schedule
Update delivery status and add notes
Manage your courier profile and performance
Scan or enter the parcel tracking number:
Send packages nationwide with secure delivery
You have a pending package to deposit into the locker.
Manage your profile and delivery history
Clear cache, logs, and manage app data
Enter your mobile number and we\'ll send you instructions to reset your PIN
RS485 communication with up to 4 STM32L412 boards (64 locks) via Winnsen protocol @ 9600 baud
📋 Instructions: Press \'Trigger Scan\' then point scanner at barcode and pull physical trigger. Results appear below with timestamps.

Scanned barcodes will appear here with timestamps...

Click 'Trigger Scan' to activate scanner.
Point scanner at barcode and pull physical trigger.
Connection info will appear here when connected
USB connection using Custom SpA Android API

Hardware Platform: Rockchip RK3399-all Android Box
Android Version: 7.1.2 (API Level 25)
Screen: 10.1" Portrait Orientation

Hardware Components:
• STM32L412 Locker Controllers (RS485)
• Honeywell Xenon 1900 Scanner (RS232)
• Custom TG2480HIII Thermal Printer (USB)

Software Stack:
• Kotlin for Android 7.1.2
• TypeScript compatible interfaces
• Custom manufacturer APIs
• Serial communication libraries
All permissions must be granted before the kiosk can operate.
Enter the 6-digit code from your SYS_ADMIN dashboard.
Enter locker short codes from the Admin Portal (e.g. ZLK4X9M2).
Tap \'Run All Tests\' to start network diagnostics...
For this kiosk setup, we\'ll use a placeholder document as no camera is available.
Generate support codes and enable remote assistance
Click \'Start Session\' to enable remote support.
Enter technician credentials to access diagnostic tools
Please provide your details for this sending process.
Slide subtitle text goes here with detailed description of the feature
Please place your package inside and securely close the door.
Thank you! Returning to main menu in 5s...
The order has been created and is awaiting drop-off.
You have an unpaid order that needs attention:\n\n
Are you sure you want to cancel this order?\n\n
Error: Package exceeds maximum locker size!
Failed to locate locker cell parameters for reserved order.
Clear cache, logs, and manage app data
Enable remote assistance and generate support codes

Logs cleared.

New log entries will appear here.
Enter technician credentials to access diagnostic tools
Please fill in all required fields
Please scan or enter a tracking number
Your package is too large to fit in any of our lockers here. Please correct your dimensions.
Location permission denied. Cannot get sender location.
Location error. Using provisioned kiosk location.
Are you sure you want to cancel? All entered data will be lost.
This will attempt to unlock ALL 16 locks. Continue?
Maintenance mode OFF — Kiosk will re-lock
Maintenance mode ON — You can now access the system
Update download failed. Please try again.
